items.title: 2026 College World Series schedule: Scores, bracket, TV times as NCAA baseball's best descend on Omaha
items.summary: Five of the eight CWS teams hail from the SEC, which seeks its seventh consecutive national championship
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Netherlands' Timber out of World Cup with injury
items.summary: Arsenal defender Jurrien Timber is ruled out of the Netherlands' World Cup campaign with a groin injury and replaced by Lutsharel Geertruida.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Stokes captaincy on the line following nightclub incident
